HEXAGHOST-ADVANCE.description: Move to the next Ghostflame. Moving onto a Ghostflame [gold]Extinguishes[/gold] it.
HEXAGHOST-ADVANCE.title: Advance
HEXAGHOST-RETRACT.description: Move to the previous Ghostflame. Moving onto a Ghostflame [gold]Extinguishes[/gold] it.
HEXAGHOST-RETRACT.title: Retract
HEXAGHOST-AFTERLIFE.description: The cyan effect will also trigger when this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
HEXAGHOST-AFTERLIFE.title: Afterlife
